ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reference_sequences" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference sequence */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* The reference sequence itself */,
  "species" TEXT /* The species to which the sequence belongs */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* The assembly version of the sequence */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome to which the reference sequence belongs */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the reference sequence in the genome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the reference sequence in the genome */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* The type of sequence (e.g., DNA, RNA, protein) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reference sequence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the reference sequence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_calls" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant call */,
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference sequence to which the variant belongs */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant in the reference sequence */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference base(s) at the variant position */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant base(s) at the position */,
  "quality" REAL /* Quality score of the variant call */,
  "coverage" INTEGER /* Coverage at the variant position */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNV, indel, structural variant) */,
  "genotype" TEXT /* Genotype of the variant call (e.g., homozygous, heterozygous) */,
  "filter" TEXT /* Filter status of the variant call (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the variant call was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the variant call was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_calls_ref_id FOREIGN KEY ("ref_id") REFERENCES reference_sequences ("ref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Full name of the gene */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol for the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome to which the gene belongs */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene in the genome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene in the genome */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the gene was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each effect */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant call to which the effect belongs */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Functional effect of the variant call (e.g., synonymous coding) */,
  "old_aa" TEXT /* Old amino acid(s) affected by the variant */,
  "new_aa" TEXT /* New amino acid(s) resulting from the variant */,
  "old_codon" TEXT /* Old codon(s) affected by the variant */,
  "new_codon" TEXT /* New codon(s) resulting from the variant */,
  "codon_num" INTEGER /* Codon number(s) affected by the variant */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the variant on the gene (e.g., HIGH, MODERATE, LOW) */,
  "functional_class" TEXT /* Functional class of the variant (e.g., synonymous, missense, nonsense) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the effect was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the effect was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effects_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_calls ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant call being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variant call */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variant call was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session during which the variant call was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the variant call was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or tool used to access the variant call */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_calls ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_gene" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id", "gene_id")
)
